def negative_sql_query_built_with_string_formatting_instead_of_parameters():
    rule_id = "sql_query_built_with_string_formatting_instead_of_parameters"
    family = "boundaries"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "SQL query string built via f-string or % formatting instead of parameterised query binding."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
